summary: A Ukrainian FPV drone destroyed an American MaxxPro armored vehicle operated by the 56th Separate Airborne Assault Brigade in Dobropole, with the strike geolocated at 48.4192093, 37.0452143. Russian forces using the "Rubikon" Center conducted strikes on March 10, 2026, targeting Ukrainian positions in Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman, destroying 162 targets including personnel and UAV control centers. Ukrainian operators are increasingly deploying Lightning drones, which are difficult to counter due to unknown control frequencies, while the BM-35 and BM-70 drone attacks on Sumy have ceased, likely due to production issues, enhanced electronic warfare, and the loss of Starlink connectivity.
